title: libpdjson5/JSON5E.md at master · boris-kolpackov/libpdjson5
excerpt: JSON/JSON5 pull parser C library. Contribute to boris-kolpackov/libpdjson5 development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
JSON5E - JSON5 for Humans

JSON5E is an extension of the JSON5 format that aims to be even more natural to write and maintain by hand. Where JSON5 retains the overall JSON shape and draws on ECMAScript 5 for inspiration, JSON5E tries harder to approximate the look and feel of a typical configuration file found in /etc while retaining the JSON object model.

Specifically, JSON5E extends JSON5 with the following syntax:

  • Implied top-level objects.

    JSON5:

    {
  delay: 10,
  timeout: 30
}

    JSON5E:

    delay: 10,
timeout: 30

    Note that top-level arrays and simple values are still supported (but there are no implied top-level arrays).

  • Newline in addition to comma as a separator.

    JSON5:

    {
  delay: 10,
  timeout: 30
}

    JSON5E:

    {
  delay: 10
  timeout: 30
}

    Note that it must be a newline, not just a whitespace.

  • - and . are allowed in unquoted object member names.

    But not as a first character.

    JSON5:

    {
  'connection-delay': 10,
  'connection-timeout': 30
}

    JSON5E:

    {
  connection-delay: 10,
  connection-timeout: 30
}

  • #-style comments in addition to // and /* */.

    JSON5:

    {
  // Initial delay before connecting.
  //
  delay: 10,

  // Connection timeout.
  //
  timeout: 30
}

    JSON5E:

    {
  # Initial delay before connecting.
  #
  delay: 10,

  # Connection timeout.
  #
  timeout: 30
}

Putting it all together, JSON5:

{
  // Initial delay before connecting.
  //
  'connection-delay': 10,

  // Connection timeout.
  //
  'connection-timeout': 30
}

JSON5E:

# Initial delay before connecting.
#
connection-delay: 10

# Connection timeout.
#
connection-timeout: 30

Which looks a lot more like a typical configuration file.

The following parser implementations support JSON5E:

  • C: libpdjson5
  • C++: libstud-json

Specifically, JSON5E extends JSON5 with the following syntax: Implied top-level objects. JSON5: { delay: 10, timeout: 30 } JSON5E: delay: 10, timeout: 30 Note that top-level arrays and simple values are still supported (but there are no implied top-level arrays). Newline in addition to comma as a separator. JSON5: { delay: 10, timeout: 30 } JSON5E: { delay: 10 timeout: 30 } Note that it must be a newline, not just a whitespace. - and . are allowed in unquoted object member names. But not as a first character. JSON5: { 'connection-delay': 10, 'connection-timeout': 30 } JSON5E: { connection-delay: 10, connection-timeout: 30 } #-style comments in addition to // and /* */. JSON5: { // Initial delay before connecting. // delay: 10, // Connection timeout. // timeout: 30 } JSON5E: { # Initial delay before connecting. # delay: 10, # Connection timeout. # timeout: 30 } Putting it all together, JSON5: { // Initial delay before connecting. // 'connection-delay': 10, // Connection timeout. // 'connection-timeout': 30 } JSON5E: # Initial delay before connecting. # connection-delay: 10 # Connection timeout. # connection-timeout: 30 Which looks a lot more like a typical configuration file. The following parser implementations support JSON5E: C: libpdjson5 C++: libstud-json

content_html_zh:
JSON5E - 人类的 JSON5

JSON5E 是 JSON5 格式的扩展，旨在更加自然地手动编写和维护。 JSON5 保留了 JSON 的整体形状并借鉴了 ECMAScript 5 的灵感，而 JSON5E 则更加努力地近似 /etc 中找到的典型配置文件的外观和感觉，同时保留了 JSON 对象模型。

具体来说，JSON5E 使用以下语法扩展了 JSON5：

  • 隐含的顶级对象。 JSON5: {delay: 10, timeout: 30 } JSON5E:delay: 10, timeout: 30 请注意，仍然支持顶级数组和简单值（但没有隐含的顶级数组）。
  • 换行除了逗号作为分隔符。 JSON5: {delay: 10, timeout: 30 } JSON5E: {delay: 10 timeout: 30 } 注意，它必须是换行符，而不仅仅是空格。
  • - 和 。 允许出现在不带引号的对象成员名称中。 但不是作为第一个角色。 JSON5: { '连接延迟': 10, '连接超时': 30 } JSON5E: { 连接延迟: 10, 连接超时: 30 }
  • 除了 // 和 /* */ 之外，# 风格的注释。 JSON5: { // 连接前的初始延迟。 // 延迟: 10, // 连接超时。 // timeout: 30 } JSON5E: { # 连接前的初始延迟。 # 延迟: 10, # 连接超时。 # 超时：30 }

把它们放在一起，JSON5：

{
  // Initial delay before connecting.
  //
  'connection-delay': 10,

  // Connection timeout.
  //
  'connection-timeout': 30
}

JSON5E:

# Initial delay before connecting.
#
connection-delay: 10

# Connection timeout.
#
connection-timeout: 30

这看起来更像是一个典型的配置文件。

以下解析器实现支持 JSON5E：

  • C：libpdjson5
  • C++：libstud-json
